profiles.name: High Judge of the Olympia Sub-Sector

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, Helianos can declare one character guilty (needs not to be an enemy). All melee attacks made by Iudex Integritatis units get the [Precision] abiltiy.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Helianos batters his enemies by reciting the holy words from the Book of Judgement. In your command phase you can select one enemy unit within 18" and visible to Helianos. That unit reduces the Hit roll by -1 until the next Iudex Integritatis command phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for this unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that doctrine this battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■TACTICUS
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a transport capacity of 30 LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY models. Each EXO-ARMOUR model takes up the space of 2 models and each EXO-FRAME model takes up the space of 3 models.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Emergency Combat Embarkation: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this TRANSPORT, it can embark within this TRANSPORT. The charging unit can then select new targets for its charge.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■[GROTS VEHICLE]
When this model joins a VEHICLE units to form an Attached Unit, all models in that unit gain the MOUNTED keyword.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When this model is leading a unit all models within this unit have the [Feel no pain 5+] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ORKS INFANTRY unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, when selecting targets for that attack, you can ignore the [Lone Operative] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, when selecting targets for this model’s The Instrument - Execution shot, it can fire a Fang of the hydra round. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack with that weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll and any successful Wound roll scores a Critical Wound.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model cannot be selected to be your Warlord.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: 2+. You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for this model. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for this model is failed, until the end of the battle, this model has no invulnerable saving throw.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: If this model is your Warlord, each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■Court of the Archon
■Incubi
■Kabalite Warriors
■Wracks
■Groteques
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal move up to 1D6". If it does so, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

rules.name: Dark Pacts
rules.description: See Codex Chaos Space Marines for more info.

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■Wracks
■Groteques
■Talos
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the [Feel no Pain 5+] ability. If that unit has the HAEMONCULUS COVEN keyword, models in that unit have the [Feel no Pain 4+] ability instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your Command phase, select one friendly DRUKHARI model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, if it is a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, until the start of your next Command phase, that model has the [Feel no Pain 5+] ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While Hephaistos is leading a TALOS unit, ignore his INFANTRY keyword until he leaves that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each critical hit scored with the Handcrafted Shoota has the [Precision] special rule.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
When this model scores a hit against an enemy unit during the shooting phase the following effects are applied to all friendly KOMMANDOZ units:


- Units can charge that unit, even if they have made a fall back or advance move before.
- Units get a 5+ Invulnerable save against attacks made by that unit.
- Add 1 to the wound rolls of melee weapons that attack that enemy unit.
- Improve the AP characteristic of melee weapons that attack that enemy unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Select a friendly unit within 6" of this model. That unit gets a 5+ Invulnerable Save against ranged attacks
characteristics.name: Description

profiles.name: In Darkness the Emperor is my Light

characteristics.$text: Each time you use a miracle dice for this model, threat the miracle dice as 6.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per turn, you can target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0 CP even if the Stratagem was already used by other units.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this models is leading a unit, all models in that unit have a Save characterisitc of 2+.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■Battle Sisters Squad
■Sisters Novitiate Squad
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:
■Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
■Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has theability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has the [Feel no Pain 4+] ability against mortal wounds and psychic attacks.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Extra Attacks, Anti-Infantry 2+, Anti-Monster 4+, Devastating Wounds
characteristics.name: Keywords

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■Talos
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: If this unit destroys an enemy unit, until the end of the battle, it is Empowered.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of your Command phase, this unit regains 1D3+1 lost wounds. This ability can´t resurrect any lost models.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
While this unit is with 6" of enemy units reduce any battle-shock and morale test made by these units by 1 if they have one or more of the following keywords:
■DARK ANGELS
■SPACE WOLVES
■BLOOD ANGELS
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When after this unit was set up on the battlefield during the reinforcement step, he can immediately make a D6" normal move towards the closest enemy unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, this unit can make a Surge of Rage move. If it does, roll one D6: each model in this unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit can only make one Surge of Rage move per phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit the unit get´s the Feel no pain 5+ ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■Fenresian Wolves
You can attach this model to a unit it can lead even if one CYBERWOLF model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.
characteristics.name: Description
